smoke.note: 4-step MoE-only (train_mlp=True) smoke on the real gen reasoning-mix (data/reasoning_dataset/openai_train.jsonl, NOT the 21-01 probe's toy example), new base Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, rank32. Loss trends down across the 4 steps. terse_rate 0.5 at n=4/temp0 is expected noise at this sample size (not the Step-6 gate, which runs in the full stage at n>=300); confirms the data->forward_backward->optim_step->sampler-export path works end to end. 21-01 gate confirmed before this run: moe_merge_probe.json merge_ok=true.

terse_gate.scope: cot+ctf (REOPEN pre-registered terse metric; scripts/tinker_fs_gate.py standalone re-score)

in_driver_full_val_arm.disposition: KNOWN MEASUREMENT ARTIFACT, not format collapse: the in-driver gate scores all 141 val rows including the 21 replay (code-gen) rows that legitimately carry no [/REASONING] (verified: all 21 no-[/REASONING] val targets are stream=replay; 20/141 terse is bounded by that set). Documented in scripts/tinker_fs_gate.py's docstring since the v1.2 run -- the canonical REOPEN metric is cot+ctf only. The in-driver temp0.7 arm never ran (process killed mid-arm after training + temp0.0 arm completed; nothing stranded thanks to the per-epoch incremental manifest); the canonical standalone gate covers both temps on the persisted ep3 checkpoint.

full.note: Full v1.2-recipe gen SFT on the new base: 3 epochs (matching wp-reasoning-v2/v3 manifests), 210 steps, bs=8, MoE-only LoRA r32 (frozen router by omission), Tinker auto-LR 4.99e-4. Loss 7.97 -> 1.46, monotone per-epoch trend. All 3 per-epoch persistent sampler checkpoints (ttl=None) preserved for GEN-03 selection -- none pruned.
